name: Rutin
description: A flavonol glycoside found in many plants, including buckwheat; tobacco; forsythia; hydrangea; viola, etc. It has been used therapeutically to decrease capillary fragility. [PubChem]

interactions.name: Thioridazine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Thioridazine can be increased when it is combined with Rutin.
